design_system.core_philosophy: Tactical Finance Command Center. Precision, Control, Truth. No decorative fluff.

headings.usage: Use for all page titles, card headers, and major metrics.

body.usage: Use for all data tables, labels, and general text. Excellent for numbers.

mono.usage: Use for AWBs, Invoice Numbers, and Code snippets.

cards.classes: bg-zinc-900/50 border border-zinc-800 backdrop-blur-md hover:border-zinc-700 transition-colors duration-200
cards.interaction: Add a subtle 'Tracing Beam' effect on hover for actionable cards.

buttons.primary: bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700 text-white font-medium shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(37,99,235,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(37,99,235,0.5)] transition-all

tables.header_classes: bg-zinc-900/80 text-zinc-400 font-medium text-xs uppercase tracking-wider border-b border-zinc-800 sticky top-0 backdrop-blur-sm z-10

inputs.classes: bg-zinc-950 border border-zinc-800 focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-blue-500/20 placeholder:text-zinc-600

data_view.toolbar: flex justify-between items-center p-4 bg-zinc-900/50 border border-zinc-800 rounded-lg

provider_logos.note: Use these images as 'Provider Avatars' in the absence of official vector logos.

general: Avoid 'AI Slop' - no generic centered layouts or unstyled gradients.
Use depth (z-index, shadows, borders) to create hierarchy.
Transitions MUST be specific (e.g., transition-colors), NEVER 'transition-all'.
NEVER use emojis as icons. Use Lucide React icons.
Ensure all text meets WCAG AA contrast ratios (4.5:1).
testing: All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute.
components: Customize Shadcn components to match the 'Midnight Tactical' theme.

instructions_to_main_agent.step_1: Install necessary fonts: Space Grotesk and Manrope.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_2: Update tailwind.config.js to extend the color palette with the 'Midnight Tactical' colors.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_3: Create a 'Layout' component that enforces the dark background and sidebar structure.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_4: Build the Dashboard using the Bento Grid strategy.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_5: Implement the Audit Engine view with a focus on progress visualization.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_6: Ensure the 'Audit Results' table handles large datasets efficiently (virtualization if needed, or pagination).
